=== Dylan Feb1474a lineLK.txt
===================
===================
===================

Forum, Inglewood, California, 14th Feb 1974 (Afternoon)

line recording, unknown lineage

[1.	Most Likely You Go Your Way (And Ill Go Mine) - missing from circulating line recording]
2.	Lay Lady Lay
3.	Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues
4.	Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
5.	It Ain't Me Babe
[6.	Ballad Of A Thin Man - Removed, released on Before The Flood]

7. Stage Fright (Band)
8. The Night They Drove Old Dixe Down (Band)
9. King Harvest (Band)
10. When You Awake (Band)
[11. I Shall Be Released (Band) - Removed, released on Before The Flood]
12. Up On Cripple Creek (Band)
 
[13.	All Along The Watchtower - Removed, released on Before The Flood]
14.	Ballad Of Hollis Brown
15.	Knockin' On Heaven's Door

< disk 2 >

16.	She Belongs To Me  (solo)
17.	It's All Over Now, Baby Blue  (solo)
18.	The Times They Are A-Changin'  (solo)
19.	Just Like A Woman  (solo)
20.	It's Alright Ma (Im Only Bleeding)  (solo)

21. Rag Mama Rag (Band)
22. This Wheel's On Fire (Band)
[23. The Shape I'm In -  - missing from circulating line recording, also released on BTF]
24. The Weight

25.	Forever Young
26.	Highway 61 Revisited
27.	Like A Rolling Stone

[28.	Blowin' In The Wind - Removed, released in part on Before The Flood]
